/usr/bin/ar qc libgame.a CMakeFiles/game.dir/32bit_warning.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/c_setcallback.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/callbacks.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/computer.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/computer_utilities.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/credits.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/engine.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/event.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/game.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/game_level.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/globals.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/gui.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/init.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/init_stubs.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/input.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/level.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/pause.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/resource.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/scripting.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/scripting_interface.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/switchCallbacks.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/timedemo.c.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/touch_interface.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgame.a
